description: Manali experienced severe traffic congestion late Saturday night due to a surge in tourist arrivals. Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

description: US and Canada are locked in a heated dispute over new streaming regulations. American officials accuse Canada of imposing discriminatory financial burdens on US platforms like Netflix, demanding a tripling of contributions to local programming. Canada defends the move as domestic law, essential for reflecting Canadian culture on screen, potentially impacting upcoming trade talks.

description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed China remains crucial for the company's $1 trillion sales forecast, including a new $200 billion CPU market. Despite US-China tensions, Huang emphasized serving the vital Chinese market. Nvidia is also ramping up production for its next-generation 'Vera' CPU and GPU platform, aiming to capture the burgeoning agentic AI sector.

CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

description: Childhood friends and distant relatives, Lingamaneni Rohit and Bolla Om, engaged in a violent car confrontation in Vijayawada over a woman. The dispute escalated from WhatsApp messages to ramming vehicles and using weapons, causing panic. Police took both into custody, suspecting ganja influence, with initial tests showing Om positive.
